title: coussarea loftonii subsp. occidentalis
intro: Coussarea loftonii subsp. occidentalis, also known as a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, is a medicinal plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coussarea loftonii subsp. occidentalis include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
